validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec vitest run src/modules/analytics/__tests__/analytics.router.test.ts src/modules/feedback/__tests__/feedbackSurvey.router.test.ts src/modules/autoresponse/__tests__/autoresponse.router.caller.test.ts && pnpm exec vitest run tests/architecture/tenant-procedure-enforcement.test.ts

validation_results.name: Lint
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec eslint src/modules/autoresponse/autoresponse.router.ts src/modules/analytics/analytics.router.ts src/modules/home/home.router.ts src/modules/misc/activity-feed.router.ts src/modules/feedback/feedbackSurvey.router.ts src/modules/ticket/ticket.router.ts src/modules/ticket/ticket-routing.router.ts src/modules/notifications/notifications.router.ts src/modules/legal/cases.router.ts src/modules/routing/routing.router.ts --max-warnings=0

kpi_results.kpi: No manual getTenantId/getUserId helper definitions in router files
Zero functional regressions in touched modules
kpi_results.actual: 128/128 scoped tests pass (analytics 78, feedback 9, autoresponse-caller 41) + architecture 5/5

notes: Repair pass 2026-04-09: rewrote prior attestation to be schema-compliant (prior verdict was 'PASS' not in enum; missing required schema_version/attestor/attestation_timestamp; had disallowed additional fields). During the pass, architecture enforcement test caught a post-merge regression in autoresponse.router.ts where getStatsByStatus used protectedProcedure + ctx.user?.tenantId while the file imports tenantProcedure on 15 other procedures. Fix: migrated getStatsByStatus to tenantProcedure and ctx.tenant.tenantId (+removed now-unused protectedProcedure import). Also fixed three test fixtures (analytics/feedback/autoresponse caller tests) that used an empty prisma mock and non-UUID tenant IDs, causing tenantMiddleware's createTenantScopedPrisma call to throw with the newly-stricter tenantProcedure chain: added minimal $extends stub and replaced 'tenant_123'/'user_123' with UUID-format IDs. Scoped validations used because api package has pre-existing unrelated test infra issues (ticket.router.test.ts CSRF mocks, home.router.coverage.test.ts BullMQ mocks, routing.router.test.ts $transaction mocks) called out in the original 2026-03-10 attestation and still present today — those tests are out of scope for IFC-194.
